_help.subject: Subject code, e.g. COMP
_help.course_prefix: Watch a whole level: '4' = all COMP 4xxx (4th year). Use course_number instead for one exact course.
_help.course_number: (alternative to course_prefix) exact number, e.g. 4102 for just COMP 4102
_help.sections: [] = every matching section. Narrow with CRNs: [{"crn":"31155"}] or sections: [{"section":"A"}].
_help.ntfy_topic: Subscribe to this exact topic in the ntfy phone app. Keep it private.
_help.poll_seconds: Seconds between checks. 600 = every 10 minutes (polite; only used when running locally/continuously).
_help.notify_on_waitlist: true = also alert when a waitlist opens up, not just open seats.
_help.notify_current_open: false = on startup, learn current state quietly and only ping you when something newly opens. true = also ping for seats already open at startup.
